segments.text: If then you were raised with Christ,
seek those things which are above, where Christ is, sitting at the right hand of God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Set your mind on things above, not on things on the earth.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For you died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: When Christ who is our life appears, then you also will appear with Him in glory.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Therefore put to death your members which are on the earth: fornication, uncleanness, passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Because of these things the wrath of God is coming upon the sons of disobedience,
in which you yourselves once walked when you lived in them.
But now you yourselves are to put off all these: anger, wrath, malice, blasphemy, filthy language out of your mouth.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not lie to one another, since you have put off the old man with his deeds,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: and have put on the new man who is renewed in knowledge according to the image of Him who created him,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: where there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all and in all.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Therefore, as the elect of God, holy and beloved, put on tender mercies, kindness, humility, meekness, longsuffering;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: bearing with one another, and forgiving one another, if anyone has a complaint against another; even as Christ forgave you, so you also must do.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But above all these things put on love, which is the bond of perfection.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body; and be thankful.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom, teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And whatever you do in word or deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through Him.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Wives, submit to your own husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Husbands, love your wives and do not be bitter toward them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Children, obey your parents in all things, for this is well pleasing to the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Fathers, do not provoke your children, lest they become discouraged.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Bondservants, obey in all things your masters according to the flesh, not with eyeservice, as men-pleasers, but in sincerity of heart, fearing God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And whatever you do, do it heartily, as to the Lord and not to men,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance; for you serve the Lord Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But he who does wrong will be repaid for what he has done, and there is no partiality.
segments.speaker: Paul
